ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the policy or directive */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the policy */,
  "print_version" TEXT /* File path to the print version of the policy */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* Reference ID for the policy */,
  "stakeholder_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder group associated with the policy */,
  "revision_history" TEXT /* Brief history of revisions */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "implementation_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for implementation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_stakeholder_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_group_id") REFERENCES stakeholder_groups ("stakeholder_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or position of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the author record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholder_groups" (
  "stakeholder_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stakeholder group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the stakeholder group record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the stakeholder group record was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the stakeholder group record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy version */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the policy */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the version of the policy */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved this version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_versions_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stakeholder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder group they belong to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the stakeholder */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the stakeholder record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the stakeholder record was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the stakeholder record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_stakeholders" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., notification, meeting, feedback) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the engagement */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_stakeholders_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_stakeholders_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the federal agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "stakeholder_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stakeholder group the agency belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the agency record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the agency record was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the agency record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_agencies" (
  "implementation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each implementation event */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date of implementation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of implementation (e.g., pending, completed, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the implementation */,
  "implementation_plan" TEXT /* Detailed implementation plan */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for implementation */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("implementation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_agencies_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_agencies_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user record was last modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the user record */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the policy */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., print version, accessible version) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Document format (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "accessibility_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is accessible */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_documents_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)
